data.title: LeonaBio Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
data.description: Secured permission for the Phase 3 development of a cutting-edge Selective Estrogen Receptor Modulator (SERM) called Lasofoxifene. This particular treatment is aimed at breast cancer patients with ESR1 mutations and is considered a groundbreaking advancement in the medical field. The endeavor presents a significant financial potential, estimated to be in the multi-billion-dollar range, opening up a vast market for this novel therapy.

data.title: Premier Health Announces Results of Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Premier Health of America Inc. (TSXV: PHA), a renowned Canadian Healthtech company, successfully conducted its annual general meeting of shareholders in Montréal. The company confirmed that all agenda items presented to shareholders were approved during this meeting.

data.title: Rumble to replace CFO in upcoming transition.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the national unemployment rate has decreased to 4.5%. This drop in unemployment is accompanied by a notable increase in job creation, with 300,000 new jobs added to the economy last month. Additionally, the stock market has seen a significant rise, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average increasing by 500 points. These positive economic indicators suggest a strengthening of the overall financial landscape in the country.

data.title: Lassonde Industries Inc. announces its Q4 and fiscal 2025 results
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Lassonde Industries Inc. (TSX: LAS.A) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025, at its headquarters in ROUGEMONT, Quebec.

data.title: OpenAI cancels Erotic ChatGPT mode, sparking debate on AI intimacy after promise for adult content features.
data.description: The decision to implement adult content features in ChatGPT comes after previous commitments to do so and amidst discussions surrounding AI intimacy.

data.title: Firan Technology Group Corporation (“FTG”) Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates
data.description: FTG, a technology corporation listed on both TSX and OTCQX under symbols FTG and FTGFF respectively, is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 8, 2026, after the market closes. This information was shared on March 26, 2026, from Toronto.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops As Trump's War Comments Hit Market; Oil Surges (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following a warning from President Trump to Iran to swiftly engage in peace negotiations. As a result, oil prices saw a significant increase. The stock market saw a drop, illustrating the impact of Trump's remarks on the market. This news on the stock market today, with the Dow decreasing and oil prices surging, emphasizes the significance of global geopolitical events on financial markets.
DBV Technologies shares 2025 financial results and business update in latest report.

data.title: Motorola Solutions Canada Networks Inc. to Acquire Bell Canada’s Land Mobile Radio Networks Services Business
data.description: In Concord, Ontario and Montréal, Motorola Solutions Canada Networks Inc., a subsidiary of Motorola Solutions, has revealed its plans to acquire the land mobile radio networks services division of Bell Mobility, a subsidiary of Bell Canada and BCE Inc. The deal, priced at CAD $675 million before adjustments and a deferred net working capital settlement, is set to be finalized in the fourth quarter. This strategic move aims to strengthen Motorola Solutions' presence in the market.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to OBX 2026-NQM5 Trust
data.description: KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 14 classes of mortgage-backed notes from OBX 2026-NQM5 Trust, a non-prime RMBS transaction totaling $876.5 million. The underlying collateral consists of 1,688 residential mortgages, with 94.0% being fixed-rate mortgages (FRMs) and 6.0% hybrid adjustable-rate mortgages (ARMs). A significant portion of the loans fall under the non-qualified mortgages (Non-QM; 40.8%) or exempt (46.6%) categories.

data.title: Auburn National Bancorporation, Inc. Elects New Director
data.description: In Auburn, Alabama on March 26, 2026, Auburn National Bancorporation, Inc. disclosed that their Boards of Directors have increased to 12 members, with Jeff Evans appointed as a director of both the Company and its subsidiary AuburnBank. Jeff Evans is set to stand for reelection as a director at the Company’s Annual Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for May 12, 2026. The Company, listed on Nasdaq as AUBN, made this announcement.

data.title: Calian Increases its Committed Credit Facility to Pursue Growth and Announces Management Change
data.description: Calian has raised its committed credit facility by $75 million to a total of $275 million, enhancing its ability to pursue acquisitions and support further growth initiatives. Additionally, the company has disclosed changes in leadership.

data.title: URSB Bancorp, Inc. Closes Initial Public Offering
data.description: In Carteret, New Jersey on March 26, 2026, URSB Bancorp, Inc. revealed the completion of its initial public offering related to the mutual-to-stock conversion of United Roosevelt Savings Bank. URSB Bancorp, Inc. serves as the stock holding company for the Bank. This announcement signifies a significant milestone for the company and the bank as they transition towards a public ownership model.

data.title: PG&E Corporation Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Oakland, California, PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) announced plans for a conference call scheduled for Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time (8:00 a.m. Pacific Time) to review their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. Interested individuals can join the call to participate in the discussion.

data.title: TAE Technologies Advances Site Evaluation Process with Multi-State Visits Ahead of First Fusion Power Plant
data.description: California-based fusion energy company TAE Technologies, Inc. has begun conducting site visits in various potential locations in the United States as of March 26, 2026. The company aims to evaluate infrastructure, grid access, and development readiness in these areas. TAE Technologies is known for being a key player in the fusion energy sector. This initiative involves assessing several sites to determine their suitability for future projects.

data.title: WM Sets Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Houston-based company WM (NYSE: WM) is set to unveil its first quarter financial results on April 28, 2026, post-market closure. An investor conference call is scheduled for April 29, 2026, at 10 a.m. ET. Interested parties can listen to the live audio webcast of the call by accessing investors.wm.com and choosing "Events & Presentations" from the website menu. A recording of the webcast will also be accessible at the same location after the call concludes.

data.title: Nortech Systems Reports Fourth Quarter Results
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Nortech Systems Incorporated (Nasdaq: NSYS) shared its financial report for the fourth quarter of 2025. Nortech, a prominent company in engineering and manufacturing solutions for various industries like medical imaging, medical devices, industrial, aerospace, and defense, disclosed its performance up to December 31, 2025. This information was provided by the company and highlights their activity in the market.

data.title: Entravision Relaunches Politics Con Acento with Expanded TV and Digital Distribution
data.description: In Los Angeles, Entravision, a prominent media, marketing, and technology firm, revealed the enhanced re-launch of Politics con Acento, a bilingual digital-first show and video podcast aimed at the Latino voting demographic. Hosted by Entravision's experienced White House Correspondent Stephanie Ochoa, the show will now be broadcast weekly as a one-hour bilingual TV program on Entravision's 21 Univision affiliates, Altavision, WAPA Orlando 26, as well as on digital and social media avenues.

data.title: Portland City Grill Renews Lease at Big Pink, Reaffirming Commitment to Downtown Portland
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, Swickard Group revealed that Portland City Grill, a prominent dining spot in the city, has extended its lease for five more years at Big Pink. Situated on the 30th floor of the tower, Portland City Grill has utilized the entire floor since 2002, offering breathtaking views of the city, the Willamette River, and the nearby mountains. The eatery has been a fixture in downtown Portland for almost 25 years, confirming its commitment to the location.
